bio: Computer Application student at Prime College, Kathmandu. Building data pipelines, ML models, and things that matter. Currently looking for data engineering internships.

projects.title: nepse-pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end data pipeline for Nepal Stock Exchange. Web scraping, PostgreSQL, dbt medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold), Airflow orchestration, and XGBoost price prediction tracked with MLflow.

projects.title: OWO
projects.description: E-commerce platform for a minimal clothing brand. Laravel/PHP backend, Tailwind CSS, MySQL, and Khalti sandbox payment integration.

projects.title: Interconnected
projects.description: Social platform built with TypeScript and React. Focus on clean architecture and real-time interactions.
